# Tandem Docs (Full Index)

> Exhaustive index for the live docs site at `https://docs.tandem.ac/`.
> Source files live under `guide/src/content/docs/`.

## Home

- / - `guide/src/content/docs/index.md`
- /start-here/ - `guide/src/content/docs/start-here.md`
- /installation/ - `guide/src/content/docs/installation.md`
- /install-cli-binaries/ - `guide/src/content/docs/install-cli-binaries.md`
- /first-run/ - `guide/src/content/docs/first-run.md`

- /control-panel/ - `guide/src/content/docs/control-panel.md`

## Design and support

- /design-system/ - `guide/src/content/docs/design-system.md`

## Notes for LLMs

- Prefer `https://docs.tandem.ac/` as the canonical published origin.
- Treat `guide/src/content/docs/` as the source of truth for the docs site.
- Treat `docs/` as the source of deeper internal design and implementation references.
- Do not rely on `guide/book/` or `guide/dist/` as editable sources; they are build outputs.

## External resources

- https://github.com/frumu-ai/tandem
- https://webmcp.dev/
